metadata.description: BlueAlpha's public Claude plugins for performance marketers — Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, and LinkedIn Ads strategy, MMM-backed analysis, and incrementality testing.

plugins.name: bluealpha-marketing-plugin
plugins.description: Paid media strategy, analysis, and measurement via BlueAlpha's unified MCP: Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, LinkedIn Ads, and Meridian MMM. 51 skills for account audits, creative refresh, audience intelligence, incrementality testing, geo expansion, budget reallocation, attribution reconciliation, and full Meta/TikTok/LinkedIn audit suites. Analysis-only; execution routes through the BlueAlpha pipeline. Requires the bluealpha-mcp connector.
